site.name: InBrowser.App
site.description: In-browser utilities that run without a backend server.
site.tagline: A browser-native utility atlas for the Astro rewrite.
site.footerNote: Static-first shell, generated registry, and localized content are now aligned behind one site layer.

metadata.homeDescription: The Astro rewrite now supports localized routes, metadata, and content loading.
metadata.toolsDescription: Browse the generated tool directory and the Astro rewrite's localization model.

home.title: A calmer, sharper shell for browser-native tools.
home.description: The rewrite now has a real user-facing shell: multilingual routes, a shared navigation model, generated search data, and page content that stays separate from interaction code.
home.toolCountDetail: Registry-backed tools already visible to the Astro shell.
home.searchCountDetail: Localized search entries generated from manifest metadata.
home.principlesTitle: The shell should explain itself before it sells itself.
home.principlesDescription: The home page now focuses on three durable ideas: generated structure, multilingual content, and a calmer browser-first experience.
home.registryDescription: Routes, search records, and sitemap entries come from manifests instead of hand-maintained wiring.
home.localeDescription: Short labels live in JSON, long-form context lives in MDX, and both resolve through the same fallback model.
home.shellDescription: Navigation, language switching, and search are now stable site surfaces instead of scattered page affordances.
home.contentTitle: How the shell is being staged
home.contentDescription: This page is intentionally honest about what is ready now and what arrives with the first migrated tool families.
home.sidebarDescription: Issue #321 finishes the shared shell. The next milestone is populating it with the first migrated tool archetypes.

tools.title: A directory that is already wired to the generated registry.
tools.description: Search runs against generated metadata and localized labels. As soon as a tool lands in the new contract, it appears here without manual route wiring.
tools.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, description, tag, or category
tools.searchHint: The query is kept in the URL and filtered against generated metadata for the active locale.
tools.resultsDescription: This index is already shaped like the final site shell, even before the first React tools are moved over.
tools.emptyRegistryTitle: The shell is ready before the catalog is full.
tools.emptyRegistryDescription: The registry and search index are connected, but the first migrated tool families land in issue #322.
tools.emptySearchTitle: No tools match this query yet.
tools.emptySearchDescription: Try a broader term or clear the search to return to the full generated directory.
tools.contentDescription: Tool detail pages inherit the same language model, metadata rules, and generated paths as the directory itself.
tools.sidebarDescription: Search is no longer a page-specific widget. It is a stable shell feature built on top of the generated registry.

tool.clientMissing: This tool does not register a client island yet.
tool.contentMissing: This tool does not ship long-form content yet.
